prestazioni: MR16DDT (1.6L Direct Injection Turbo) engine: Full forged internals including Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons to handle 350+ hp reliably. Upgraded head studs from ARP and ported cylinder head by Tomei for improved airflow.

Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX2867R Gen II with a custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing and 55mm compressor wheel, paired with a Tomei M82 cast manifold and 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system featuring a custom Burns Stainless 304 stainless steel muffler for optimized spool and flow.

Fuel system overhaul with Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup to prevent oil buildup in the intake tract. ECU recalibration via COBB Accessport with a custom dyno-tuned map by RS Enthalpy for 28psi peak boost on E85 blend.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny PJ-NS-01 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler for aggressive stance and aero balance. Kit includes extended wheel arches to fit 9.5x18 ET30 front and 10.5x18 ET25 rear Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels with 245/40R18 and 275/35R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires.

Custom front splitter and rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon with integrated air curtains and vortex generators for downforce optimization. Underbody aero includes a custom aluminum belly pan with NACA ducts for brake cooling and a rear diffuser with Gurney flap for increased rear grip.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a full Cusco bolt-in roll cage (8-point, chromoly steel) and Recaro Pole Position bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Dashboard and door cards wrapped in Alcantara with red contrast stitching, and a custom digital gauge cluster from Defi with oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR readouts.
